name: Dalgona
overview: 'Dalgona' will center around high school students who are searching for true friendship. Song Mi Na studies abroad after being bullied, and though she has a bright and optimistic personality, it's obvious the past still haunts her when she returns to South Korea.

trailers.title: [달고나] 몰아보기 통합본 EP. 01-04 | Web Drama Dalgona EP. 01-04 [ENG SUB]
